ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cable_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cable specification */,
  "industry_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry standard */,
  "cable_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cable type */,
  "nominal_cross_section" TEXT /* Nominal cross-section of the cable */,
  "conductor_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the conductor */,
  "insulation_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the insulation */,
  "inner_covering_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the inner covering */,
  "lead_sheath_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the lead sheath */,
  "sheath_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the sheath */,
  "overall_diameter" REAL /* Overall diameter of the cable */,
  "design_date" TEXT /* Date when the cable design was created or last updated */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who designed the cable */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the cable design was approved for production */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the cable design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cable_specs_industry_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_standard_id") REFERENCES industry_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cable_specs_cable_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cable_type_id") REFERENCES cable_types ("cable_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cable_specs_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cable_specs_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the manufacturing process */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "manufacturing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing process */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of quality control test */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control check was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the quality control check */,
  "test_results_file" TEXT /* File attachment or URL containing the detailed test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cable specification */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the cable in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the cable is stored */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Details about the storage conditions for the cables (e.g., temperature, humidity, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES cable_specs ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cable specification sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the cable */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the cable sold */,
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order status */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_status_id") REFERENCES order_statuses ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES cable_specs ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the customer belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cable_types" (
  "cable_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cable type */,
  "cable_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cable type (e.g., power cable, communication cable, etc.) */,
  "cable_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cable type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cable_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "machine_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type (e.g., tensile strength test, insulation resistance test, etc.) */,
  "test_type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, etc.) */,
  "order_status_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id")
)
